title: CompactionAction
description: Single append-only entry in opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/log.jsonl. Each entry records one compaction proposal produced by the `claw` agent. Entries are immutable; rollbacks are new entries with op="rollback" pointing at a prior id.

id.description: Stable identifier for the action; used by composter rollback proposals.

session_id.description: Opaque session identifier from the agent runtime (e.g. opencode session uuid).

op.description: Compaction axis. `rollback` is reserved for entries that revert a prior action (then `targets[0]` must be the prior action id).

items.description: Repo-relative path of a skill, MCP config, or compose service the action touches; or for rollback the prior `id` (act_...).

rationale.description: Short human-readable justification, e.g. "triggers overlap 4/6; procedures share evidence-gathering step".

evidence.description: HARD constraint: every action must cite at least one path:line (or path:line-range) reference in the repo.

proposed_artifact.description: Repo-relative path to a draft (e.g. opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/drafts/<op-id>/SKILL.md). Required when op is merge/collapse/rebudget.

human_gate.description: State of the human review gate. `claw` writes only `pending`. `composter` may propose state transitions but cannot apply them.

model.description: Provider/model id used to produce the proposal, e.g. `litellm/qwen3.6-35b-heretic`.

summary_ref.description: Anchor reference into the daily summary file, e.g. `summaries/2026-05-25.md#merge-research-code-review`.

registry_snapshot.description: Repo-relative path to the registry snapshot used to compute this action.
